title: Comment from Community Clinic Association of Los Angeles County, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
commenter_name: Community Clinic Association of Los Angeles County
organization: Community Clinic Association of Los Angeles County
comment_text: On behalf of the Community Clinic Association of Los Angeles County (CCALAC) and our 68 nonprofit community health center member organizations, thank you for the opportunity to provide our comments in response to the Assistant Secretary for Technology Policy (ASTP)/Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology (ONC) proposed rule “ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions to Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5).” Please view the attached file for our comments.
